chapter_title.en: Chapter 69 – The righteousness with the parents

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/419)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/419)
text: جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ مَنْ أَبَرُّ قَالَ أُمَّكَ قَالَ ثُمَّ مَنْ قَالَ أُمَّكَ قَالَ ثُمَّ مَنْ قَالَ أُمَّكَ قَالَ ثُمَّ مَنْ قَالَ أَبَاكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Salim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> having said: ‘A man came over to the Prophet<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> and he said, ‘O Rasool-Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup>! Whom shall I be more righteous with?’ He<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> said: ‘Your mother’. He said, ‘Then who?’ He<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> said: ‘Your mother’. He said, ‘Then who?’ He<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> said: ‘Your mother’. He said, ‘Then who?’ He<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> said: ‘Your father’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hisham ibn Salim from abu ‘Abd Allah who has said the following: “Once a man came to the Holy Prophet and said, ‘O Messenger of Allah, to whom should I be kind?’ The Messenger of Allah said, ‘Be kind to your mother.’ The man asked, ‘Then whom?’ The Messenger of Allah said, ‘Your mother.’ The man asked, ‘Then whom?’ The Messenger of Allah said, ‘Your mother.’ The man asked, ‘Then whom?’ The Messenger of Allah said, “Be kind to your father.”
